latin: Parva pretia solvimus pro re magna. Thanus credidit se mundum servare debere — dimidiam partem omnium viventium delendo. haec erat philosophia eius insana.

questions.prompt: What did Thanos believe he needed to destroy?

translation: A small price to pay for salvation. Thanos believed he must save the world — by destroying half of all living beings. This was his insane philosophy.
